issuer: The Distribution Code Review Panel (DCRP); owned collectively by the DNOs
statusDate: 10 March 2025 (rolling issues; check DCode website for latest)
authority: Industry code; compliance is a condition of the distribution licence
summary: The technical rulebook for the GB distribution networks — the distribution equivalent of the Grid Code. Defines technical requirements for DNOs and all parties connected to a distribution network, including embedded generators, IDNOs, and large demand customers. Where G98/G99 specify engineering details, the D-Code sets the overarching framework.
scope: DPC — Distribution Planning and Connection Code (planning standards, design, N-1 rules)
DOC — Distribution Operating Code (switching, outages, control arrangements)
Connection technical standards (voltage, fault level, earthing)

keyParts.name: DPC — Distribution Planning & Connection Code
keyParts.detail: Security of supply standards at distribution (P2/7 replacement), connection design, fault level management.

keyParts.name: DOC — Distribution Operating Code
keyParts.detail: Switching procedures, outage planning, fault restoration, ANM arrangements.

keyParts.name: DPC5 — Embedded generation
keyParts.detail: Technical requirements for generators embedded in the distribution network — works with G98/G99.

keyParts.name: DDRC
keyParts.detail: Data registration and exchange; DNO-held data for network planning.
